offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, overdue payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking of invoices and payment reminders.
problem: Overdue payments leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Community forums where freelancers share tools
try_it: Let users try the invoice aging dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
